name: EO convention ruleset passes a fully compliant cloud IaC file
command:
printf %s 'resource "x" "y" {
  image = "repo@sha256:abc"
  provenance = true
  scan = "trivy"
}
' > green.tf
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-conventions.sh --tool terraform --iac green.tf --ruleset $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-conventions/eo-security.yaml
